title: DevSecOps Engineer
description:
Position: DevSecOps Engineer

Job Summary

We are seeking a hands-on DevSecOps Engineer for one of our esteemed clients to build and operate secure, cloud-native infrastructure across AWS, GCP, and on-prem environments, enabling scalable CI/CD for containerized microservices.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, implement, and maintain secure CI/CD pipelines for containerized applications
  • Deploy and operate AWS ECS (Fargate) services and supporting AWS components (S3, RDS, IAM, networking)
  • Provision and manage GCP Kubernetes (GKE) clusters using Terraform
  • Ensure configuration and environment consistency across on-prem SIT and cloud staging environments
  • Implement and enforce IAM policies, secrets management, and network security controls
  • Integrate automated security scanning, compliance checks, and policy enforcement into CI/CD workflows
  • Monitor system health and performance, troubleshoot issues, and continuously improve reliability and scalability
  • Maintain clear and comprehensive architecture diagrams, runbooks, and operational documentation.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience
  • 5+ years of experience in DevOps, Cloud, or Platform Engineering
  • Strong hands-on experience with AWS ECS (Fargate) and core AWS services
  • Solid experience with Kubernetes, preferably GKE (kubectl, Helm)
  • Proven use of Terraform for infrastructure as code
  • Experience with CI/CD tools such as GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or similar
  • Strong knowledge of cloud security (IAM, VPC networking, secrets management)
  • Proficiency in Linux systems and scripting (Bash, Python).
  • Demonstrates strong ownership, clear communication, and effective collaboration across teams and environments.

Preferred Skills

  • Experience in regulated or security-sensitive environments
  • Familiarity with DevSecOps practices and secure SDLC frameworks

Other Information 
Work Location: Central/West-Central
Job Type: Contract - 1 Year (Extendable)
Salary Range: S$7,000 - S$9,000

This is an outsource role 

If you are interested, kindly send your resume (in MS Word format) to Mounika at mounika@rmabpo.com stating your salary expectations & availability to take it forward. 

All Curriculum Vitae will be treated with the strict confidentiality. 

By sending us your personal data, you are deemed to consent to RMA Consultants Pte Ltd and its affiliates collecting, using and disclosing your personal data for the purposes set out in our Data Protection Policy at http://bit.ly/3GHgskn and Privacy Policy at http://bit.ly/3W63rp7. 
 
This is in partnership with the Employment and Employability Institute Pte Ltd (“e2i”). 

"e2i is the empowering network for workers and employers seeking employment and employability solutions. e2i serves as a bridge between workers and employers, connecting with workers to offer job security through job-matching, career guidance and skills upgrading services, and partnering employers to address their manpower needs through recruitment, training, and job redesign solutions. e2i is a tripartite initiative of the National Trades Union Congress set up to support nation-wide manpower and skills upgrading initiatives. By applying for this role, you consent to RMA Groups’s PDPA and e2i’s PDPA.” 
 
Mounika Tanuku|EA Regn. No. R22109193 
RMA Consultants Pte Ltd|EA Licence No. 93C4403
